title: ChillCrafts
description: A calm, immersive vanilla+ modpack focused on atmosphere, animations and living worlds.
body:
🌿 ChillCraft – A Living, Atmospheric Minecraft Experience

ChillCraft is a carefully curated Fabric modpack focused on atmosphere, immersion, and visual life, without changing the core gameplay of Minecraft.

This modpack does not aim to add new weapons, mobs, or complex mechanics.
Instead, its goal is simple:

Make the Minecraft world feel alive.

✨ Key Features

🧍 Smooth and natural animations
Players, mobs, and villagers move in a more fluid and lifelike way instead of feeling robotic.

🌍 A more immersive world
Ambient sounds and subtle visual effects make the environment feel active and breathing.

🌗 Enhanced day & night atmosphere
Beautiful lighting and calm transitions that improve mood without overwhelming visuals.

🌿 Vanilla-friendly visuals
The classic Minecraft look is preserved, only refined and enhanced.

⚙️ Stable & performance-oriented
Designed for long play sessions with optimized performance.

🎯 Who Is ChillCraft For?

Players who enjoy relaxed gameplay

Builders who care about atmosphere

Vanilla players who want better visuals without losing the original feel

Anyone tired of Minecraft’s flat and empty atmosphere

ℹ️ Technical Info

Mod Loader: Fabric

Client-side only (Compatible with vanilla servers)

Shader support available (optional)

ChillCraft transforms Minecraft into a calmer, more immersive, and visually pleasing experience.
Explore, build, and relax in a world that truly feels alive.
